remediation_steps.description: Locate the live explanation/render path in `glyph_english_realizer.py` before patching.
Refine `glyph_clause_builder.py` to ensure 'what does X do' queries are correctly routed and do not hijack 'what does X mean'.
Implement narrow structural shims in `shape_glyph_refiner.py` for the failing `affect>memory>inner_mirror` paths.
Run the latest sweep to confirm glyph wins increase from 117/123 toward 123/123.
